name: Honey Bear Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend vegetable oil, butter (margarine), brown sugar, honey, egg, and water in a bowl until smooth.
2. Mix in flour, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon.
3. Add oats and any optional ingredients such as chocolate chips or chopped apples and raisins.
4. Drop heaping teaspoons of the dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes.
Serves 10 hungry kids.
